page_metadata.biotools__summary: The AFTM database reports the transmebrane segments identified by AlphaFold structural models of human proteins and compares them to those in the UniProt database and the Human Transmembrane Proteome (HTP) database.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The AFTM database reports the transmebrane segments identified by AlphaFold structural models of human proteins and compares them to those in the UniProt database and the Human Transmembrane Proteome (HTP) database.
